title: Full body waifus, AI dreams, realtime AI music, open-source Gemini Omni: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search channel covers major AI releases including Minimax M3, Ideogram v4, Gemma 4, Nemotron 3 Ultra, and tools spanning text generation, music, video, and robotics. The episode emphasizes recent advances in generative models, real-time AI music, dreaming capabilities, and open-source options including a Gemini Omni variant.
